payload.title: Cross-crate named-arg lowering via CalleeRegistry
payload.description: Currently CalleeRegistry is built only from fns defined in the same file. Calls to rustricted_std::fs::read_to_string(path: p) are not lowered — they pass through as-is and fail rustc. Fix: populate CalleeRegistry from the named signatures of imported crates (rustricted-std at minimum). Approach TBD: could parse lib.rs at lower time, or use a metadata file.
